player.title: Player
player.noPlaylistSelected: Select a playlist and choose a song.

musicas.title: Songs
musicas.name: Name
musicas.notePlaceholder: E.g. Starts with guitar. Watch the solo.
musicas.errorDuplicateName: A song with that name already exists.

playlists.title: Playlists
playlists.selectPlaylistHint: Select a playlist to view/edit its items.
playlists.errorDuplicateName: A playlist with that name already exists.
playlists.limitReached: Free plan limit reached ({{count}} items per playlist).

backup.title: Backup (JSON / Excel CSV)
backup.description: Your data lives on this phone/browser (localStorage). Export a file to keep on your phone or in the cloud; import to restore or merge songs from a CSV sheet (Name;BPM, opens in Excel).
backup.importResultSkipped: Imported {{added}} song(s). {{skipped}} left out — Free plan limit reached.
backup.upgradeSuffix: Become PRO in the Account tab to import everything.
backup.errorNoSongsInCsv: No songs found in the CSV.

conta.title: Account
conta.notConfigured: Account and sync are unavailable — missing configuration in this environment. The Free plan keeps working normally, no login required.
conta.loginPrompt: Sign in to unlock your PRO on any device and sync your songs and playlists to the cloud.
conta.linkSentMessage: Check your email — we sent you a link to sign in.
conta.thankYouPro: Thank you! All tools are unlocked on this and any other device where you sign in.
conta.syncConflictTitle: We found data in the cloud and on this device
conta.syncConflictBody: The cloud has {{songs}} song(s) and {{playlists}} playlist(s) saved from another device. Do you want to use the cloud data (replaces this device's) or keep the local data (replaces the cloud's)?
